headline: Lightskin Legends ✊🏽: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Lightskin Legends ✊🏽 carries a championship-lineup C-AVI average of 81.18, led by Jonathan Taylor, Chase Brown, and Javonte Williams. The clearest lineup pressure point is the WR slot held by Parker Washington at 64.8 C-AVI.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Jonathan Taylor (97.6), Chase Brown (96.3), and Javonte Williams (81.0).

sections.title: Recent Trade Impact
sections.body: No recent franchise trade met the relevance threshold in the authoritative historical trade ledger.

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Parker Washington is the lowest C-AVI starter in the verified championship lineup at 64.8. Any acquisition should clear that lineup threshold.

sections.title: Depth and Flexibility
sections.body: The team file contains 8 offensive players, with 2 outside the modeled starting eight. The offensive roster D-AVI average is 70.72.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 8 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active.
